'''Dravione''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]] of the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]. One of the first [[Xer's Campaigns|conquests]] of the [[Pirate King/Legends|Pirate King]] [[Xer VIII]] when he expanded from [[Argai]], its prominence was rapidly eclipsed by nearby [[Jaminere/Legends|Jaminere]]. By the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was a bleak agricultural world notable only for a handful of [[Xim/Legends|Xim]]-era aeries in the planet's mountains that were remarkably well-preserved by the thin air.

[[Bleys Harand]] visited the planet in the hopes of finding an accurate representation of the face of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] and was told of a statue of Xim in the aeries. However, he found the courtyards empty but for a ruined statue that was missing everything above the calves. He recorded his journey in ''[[Travels Amid Strange Stars]]''.
